description_long: This object is a stylized doll with a simple, cylindrical body and a rounded head, topped with a wide-brimmed straw hat. The body is cream-colored and slightly tapered, with a circular base at the bottom and a disc-like collar at the top. Two straight, horizontal arms extend from either side of the upper body, resembling wooden dowels. The lower portion of the doll features a single vertical post, suggesting it could be staked into the ground or used as a stand. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible facial features, clothing details, or articulated limbs. The hat is textured to resemble woven straw, adding a rustic, handcrafted appearance.
description: A minimalistic cream-colored doll with a rounded head, wide-brimmed straw hat, and simple cylindrical body, featuring straight horizontal arms and a vertical post base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's rounded head, wide-brimmed straw hat, and both horizontal arms extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the hat and the cylindrical body, with one arm visible and the vertical post clearly seen.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the back of the hat and both arms, with no facial features or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the hat's profile, one arm, and the vertical post.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is adorned with a wide-brimmed straw hat, but no other visible clothing or patterns are present. The style is rustic and minimal, reminiscent of traditional scarecrow or folk dolls.
attribute_pose: The doll's body is upright and static, with both arms extended horizontally outward and the head facing forward. The torso is cylindrical and the lower post is vertical, suggesting a fixed, unmoving stance.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are present on the doll's head.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is covered entirely by a wide-brimmed straw hat.
